records.m_Talk_ENG: I used the terminal to search for the keyword <color=#ffd34c>Shepherd</color> and got a lot of search results.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I used the terminal to search for the keyword <color=#ffd34c>Shepherd</color> and got a lot of search results.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I used the terminal to search for the keyword <color=#ffd34c>Shepherd</color> and got a lot of search results.

records.m_Talk_ENG: First of all, the name "Shepherd" doesn't refer to a single test subject. It's actually the name of a project carried out in this facility.
records.m_Talk_DEU: First of all, the name "Shepherd" doesn't refer to a single test subject. It's actually the name of a project carried out in this facility.
records.m_Talk_FRA: First of all, the name "Shepherd" doesn't refer to a single test subject. It's actually the name of a project carried out in this facility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are traces of attempts to control C.O.s using the Shepherd experiment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are traces of attempts to control C.O.s using the Shepherd experiment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are traces of attempts to control C.O.s using the Shepherd experiment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They used this new substance called the <color=#ffd34c>Spriggan Factor</color>, and it appeared to be somewhat effective.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They used this new substance called the <color=#ffd34c>Spriggan Factor</color>, and it appeared to be somewhat effective.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They used this new substance called the <color=#ffd34c>Spriggan Factor</color>, and it appeared to be somewhat effective.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. Why would they just abandon the result of an amazing project in rubble?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd. Why would they just abandon the result of an amazing project in rubble?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. Why would they just abandon the result of an amazing project in rubble?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They either determined it was a failure, gave up, or didn't have the resources to take it with them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They either determined it was a failure, gave up, or didn't have the resources to take it with them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They either determined it was a failure, gave up, or didn't have the resources to take it with them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even more so if the Administration found out the location of this facility.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even more so if the Administration found out the location of this facility.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even more so if the Administration found out the location of this facility.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Then that gun the advance party had was from the Northern Union
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Then that gun the advance party had was from the Northern Union
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Then that gun the advance party had was from the Northern Union
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: It means that the person we're after is most likely a Northern Union spy who is after Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It means that the person we're after is most likely a Northern Union spy who is after Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It means that the person we're after is most likely a Northern Union spy who is after Shepherd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Taking on the job by deceiving the Administration and disguising as a lifter... If it really is a spy, it's no ordinary one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Taking on the job by deceiving the Administration and disguising as a lifter... If it really is a spy, it's no ordinary one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Taking on the job by deceiving the Administration and disguising as a lifter... If it really is a spy, it's no ordinary one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I feel like I just jumped into the middle of a huge event.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I feel like I just jumped into the middle of a huge event.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I feel like I just jumped into the middle of a huge event.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's get moving. The lab we're looking for should be close by.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's get moving. The lab we're looking for should be close by.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's get moving. The lab we're looking for should be close by.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: B Wing. Project Shepard Lab Facility.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: B Wing. Project Shepard Lab Facility.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: B Wing. Project Shepard Lab Facility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The left side is the test subject quarantine room. And if you go to the right, there is a monitor room where you can watch over the test subjects.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The left side is the test subject quarantine room. And if you go to the right, there is a monitor room where you can watch over the test subjects.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The left side is the test subject quarantine room. And if you go to the right, there is a monitor room where you can watch over the test subjects.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm detecting a lot of C.O.s in the quarantine room. We'd better prepare if we're gonna go in there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm detecting a lot of C.O.s in the quarantine room. We'd better prepare if we're gonna go in there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm detecting a lot of C.O.s in the quarantine room. We'd better prepare if we're gonna go in there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My Eternium shield is also running low now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My Eternium shield is also running low now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My Eternium shield is also running low now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll go to the left. Spencer, you go to the monitor room and use the cameras to find that kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll go to the left. Spencer, you go to the monitor room and use the cameras to find that kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll go to the left. Spencer, you go to the monitor room and use the cameras to find that kid.
